verses.text: The night-watchers in God's house are called to bless the LORD and lift up holy hands in the sanctuary. Even the night hours are for praise. The servants of God find no time unfit for blessing Him.
The night-watchers in God's house are called to bless the LORD and lift up holy hands in the sanctuary. Even the night hours are for praise. The servants of God find no time unfit for blessing Him.
They are answered with a blessing: 'The LORD that made heaven and earth bless thee out of Zion.' Praise is met with grace. Those who bless God are themselves blessed by the Maker of all.
